functions.name: addRedis
functions.description: Adds a Redis container to the application model.
functions.remarks:
This resource includes built-in health checks. When this resource is referenced as a dependency
using the `WaitFor``1`
extension method then the dependent resource will wait until the Redis resource is able to service
requests.
This version of the package defaults to the tag of the container image.
functions.signature: addRedis(name: string, port?: number, password?: ParameterResource): RedisResource

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: The host port to bind the underlying container to.

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: The parameter used to provide the password for the Redis resource. If `null` a random password will be generated.

functions.name: connectionStringExpression
functions.description: Gets the connection string expression for the Redis server.

functions.name: host
functions.description: Gets the host endpoint reference for this resource.

functions.name: passwordParameter
functions.description: Gets the parameter that contains the Redis server password.

functions.name: port
functions.description: Gets the port endpoint reference for this resource.

functions.name: primaryEndpoint
functions.description: Gets the primary endpoint for the Redis server.

functions.name: setPasswordParameter
functions.description: Gets the parameter that contains the Redis server password.

functions.name: tlsEnabled
functions.description: Indicates whether TLS is enabled for the Redis server.
functions.remarks:
This property proxies through to `TlsEnabled` on the
`PrimaryEndpoint`. When set to `true`, the connection string
expression dynamically includes `,ssl=true` and the URI expression uses the
`rediss://` scheme. This value is resolved lazily at expression evaluation time,
avoiding timing issues when TLS is enabled later in the application lifecycle
(e.g., during the `BeforeStartEvent`).

functions.name: uriExpression
functions.description: Gets the connection URI expression for the Redis server.
functions.remarks: Format: `redis://[:{password}@]{host}:{port}`. The password segment is omitted when no password is configured.

functions.name: withDataBindMount
functions.description: Adds a bind mount for the data folder to a Redis container resource and enables Redis persistence.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: The source directory on the host to mount into the container.

parameters.name: isReadOnly
parameters.description: A flag that indicates if this is a read-only mount. Setting this to `true` will disable Redis persistence. Defaults to `false`.

functions.name: withDataBindMount
functions.description: Adds a bind mount for the data folder to a Redis Insight container resource.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: The source directory on the host to mount into the container.

functions.name: withDataVolume
functions.description: Adds a named volume for the data folder to a Redis container resource and enables Redis persistence.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the volume. Defaults to an auto-generated name based on the application and resource names.

parameters.name: isReadOnly
parameters.description: A flag that indicates if this is a read-only volume. Setting this to `true` will disable Redis persistence. Defaults to `false`.

functions.name: withDataVolume
functions.description: Adds a named volume for the data folder to a Redis Insight container resource.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the volume. Defaults to an auto-generated name based on the application and resource names.

functions.name: withHostPort
functions.description: Configures the host port that the Redis Commander resource is exposed on instead of using randomly assigned port.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: The port to bind on the host. If `null` is used random port will be assigned.

functions.name: withHostPort
functions.description: Configures the host port that the Redis Insight resource is exposed on instead of using randomly assigned port.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: The port to bind on the host. If `null` is used random port will be assigned.

functions.name: withHostPort
functions.description: Configures the host port that the Redis resource is exposed on instead of using randomly assigned port.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: The port to bind on the host. If `null` is used random port will be assigned.

functions.name: withPassword
functions.description: Configures the password that the Redis resource is used.

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: The parameter used to provide the password for the Redis resource. If `null`, no password will be configured.

functions.name: withPersistence
functions.description: Configures a Redis container resource for persistence.
functions.remarks:
Use with `WithDataBindMount`
or `WithDataVolume` to persist Redis data across sessions with custom persistence configuration, e.g.:
```
var cache = builder.AddRedis("cache")
.WithDataVolume()
.WithPersistence(TimeSpan.FromSeconds(10), 5);
```

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: The interval between snapshot exports. Defaults to 60 seconds.

parameters.name: keysChangedThreshold
parameters.description: The number of key change operations required to trigger a snapshot at the interval. Defaults to 1.

functions.name: withRedisCommander
functions.description: Configures a container resource for Redis Commander which is pre-configured to connect to the `RedisResource` that this method is used on.
functions.remarks: This version of the package defaults to the tag of the container image.
functions.signature: withRedisCommander(configureContainer?: (obj: RedisCommanderResource) => Promise<void>, containerName?: string): RedisResource

parameters.name: configureContainer
parameters.description: Configuration callback for Redis Commander container resource.

parameters.name: containerName
parameters.description: Override the container name used for Redis Commander.

functions.name: withRedisInsight
functions.description: Configures a container resource for Redis Insight which is pre-configured to connect to the `RedisResource` that this method is used on.
functions.remarks: This version of the package defaults to the tag of the container image.
functions.signature: withRedisInsight(configureContainer?: (obj: RedisInsightResource) => Promise<void>, containerName?: string): RedisResource

parameters.name: configureContainer
parameters.description: Configuration callback for Redis Insight container resource.

parameters.name: containerName
parameters.description: Override the container name used for Redis Insight.

handleTypes.name: RedisResource
handleTypes.description: A resource that represents a Redis resource independent of the hosting model.
handleTypes.remarks: A resource that represents a Redis resource independent of the hosting model.
